title: Cola Mod
description: A small mod that adds new cola plant plastic,plastic cans and Coke and kola can. Plus a new achievement
body: A small mod that adds new cola plant that could be found in plains biome and drops kola beans, plastic that could be crafted by smelting coal in furnace,plastic cans crafted of plastic and Coke and kola can a drinkable item like honey bottle. Plus a new achievement for drinking coke and cola. If you want new food type and experince with it this mod is for you.
